testcase.name: test_invalid_login_returns_error
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_security.py:52: in test_invalid_login_returns_error assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 200 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rate_limit_after_failed_attempts
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_security.py:87: in test_rate_limit_after_failed_attempts assert response.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 after rate limit, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 after rate limit, got 404: {"detail":"User not registered. Please register to continue."} E assert 404 == 429 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_activate_partial_lockdown
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_admin_security.py:214: in test_activate_partial_lockdown status = status_response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_deactivate_lockdown
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_admin_security.py:237: in test_deactivate_lockdown status = status_response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_update_ip_whitelist
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_security.py:310: in test_update_ip_whitelist assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_disable_ip_whitelist
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_security.py:335: in test_disable_ip_whitelist assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_creates_session
testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_security.py:464: in test_login_creates_session assert dashboard_response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
